description: Taxonomy describing the level of AI assistance and the level of review/update involved in the creation of an intelligence package or event.

predicates.description: Describes the degree to which AI assisted in the original creation of the intelligence package or event.
Describes the level of human or AI review, validation, or update performed after the initial creation.

entry.description: The content was generated entirely by a human without AI assistance.
AI provided limited support such as wording suggestions, spell-checking, summarisation, or formatting, but the substantive content was human generated.
AI substantially contributed to drafting or structuring the content, but a human remained the primary author.
AI generated most of the content based on human prompts, instructions, or curation.
The content was generated entirely or almost entirely by AI.
No meaningful review or validation was performed after generation.
The content was reviewed, refined, or checked only by AI.
A human reviewed the content for quality, coherence, or correctness.
A human reviewed the content and made substantive corrections, updates, or additions.
The content underwent review by multiple humans, or a formal editorial/analytic validation process.
